top_five.rationale: Most likely incumbent to bolt flash retail onto a D&D contract; already owns venue, AV, stage and the MNC HR relationship; bolt-on is months not years.
Direct competitor for the same HR engagement-gifting budget line; default reflex when HR Lead wants 'give the team something'; 1,000+ partner brands.
Same brand-funded-surplus inventory thesis; if they white-label inventory rail to a corp-event partner, that partner becomes flashcart's biggest threat.
Strongest in SGD 5-30 goodie-bag/D&D-gift slot — exactly the spend flashcart cannibalises; active corporate-gifting brand with same-day delivery infra.
DIY: HR runs lucky draw + Giftano vouchers + photo booth themselves. Always largest 'competitor' in employer-experience markets; the win-loss line.
